summary: Completed comprehensive testing of WellTrack Landing Page + SA Subdomain Support. All 12 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified via Playwright (100%).
critical_code_review_comments: Landing page renders correctly at / (root path) in dev mode with dark slate-950 background and emerald accents
School Login button in nav (data-testid='nav-login-btn') opens school finder modal
Find Your School hero CTA (data-testid='hero-login-btn') opens school finder modal
School finder modal (data-testid='school-finder-modal') validates slugs via GET /api/school-lookup
GET /api/school-lookup?slug=demo returns {exists: true, name: 'Demo School', slug: 'demo'}
School finder shows 'Found: Demo School — redirecting...' for valid slugs
School finder shows error message for invalid slugs
In dev mode, valid slug redirects to /login (not subdomain)
Super Admin Portal link navigates to /sa/login
SA portal accessible at /sa/login and /sa/dashboard in dev mode
School login page works at /login path with Demo School context
Landing page sections all render: hero, features, how it works, CTA, footer
Middleware correctly bypasses tenant resolution for /api/school-lookup endpoint
seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo and mooroopna schools
context_for_next_testing_agent: Landing page and school finder fully verified. Key features: (1) Landing page at / in dev mode with dark theme; (2) School finder modal validates slugs via GET /api/school-lookup (no auth required); (3) Valid slug shows success message then redirects to /login in dev mode; (4) Invalid slug shows error message; (5) SA portal accessible at /sa/login and /sa/dashboard; (6) Super Admin Portal link on landing page navigates to /sa/login; (7) All existing school features (login, dashboard) continue to work.
passed_tests: TestSchoolLookup::test_lookup_valid_slug_demo - Demo school lookup returns exists=true
TestSchoolLookup::test_lookup_valid_slug_mooroopna - Mooroopna school lookup returns exists=true
TestSchoolLookup::test_lookup_invalid_slug - Invalid slug returns exists=false
TestSchoolLookup::test_lookup_empty_slug - Empty slug returns exists=false
TestSchoolLookup::test_lookup_short_slug - Short slug (<2 chars) returns exists=false
TestSchoolLookup::test_lookup_no_slug_param - No slug param returns exists=false
TestSchoolLookup::test_lookup_case_insensitive - DEMO finds demo (case insensitive)
TestSchoolLookup::test_lookup_with_whitespace - Whitespace trimmed from slug
TestSchoolLookupNoAuth::test_no_auth_required - Works without auth headers
TestSchoolLookupNoAuth::test_no_tenant_header_required - Works without X-Tenant-Slug header
TestExistingSchoolFeatures::test_school_login_endpoint - School login works
TestExistingSchoolFeatures::test_sa_login_endpoint - SA login works
Frontend: Landing page renders at / with hero, features, how it works, CTA, footer
Frontend: Nav login button (School Login) visible and clickable
Frontend: Hero login button (Find Your School) visible and clickable
Frontend: Super Admin Portal link visible and navigates to /sa/login
Frontend: School finder modal opens on button click
Frontend: School finder validates slug and shows success message for 'demo'
Frontend: School finder shows error message for invalid slug 'fakeschool'
Frontend: Valid slug redirects to /login page in dev mode
Frontend: School login page works at /login with Demo School context
Frontend: SA login page works at /sa/login
Frontend: SA dashboard accessible after login
